description_long: This decorative flower arrangement features a blue-and-white ceramic bowl filled with a variety of plant elements. At the center, a large, textured piece of brown driftwood rises vertically, surrounded by tall, green stems topped with orange-yellow tulip-like buds. Around the base, there are several spherical green moss balls, two round cacti with white spines, and a white sculpted flower. Additional succulents and black moss-like accents are interspersed among the plants, while thin, pale twigs add height and visual interest. The overall composition is lush and visually balanced, with a harmonious mix of textures and colors.
description: A blue-and-white ceramic bowl holds a lush arrangement of tulip-like flowers, cacti, moss balls, succulents, and driftwood, creating a vibrant and textured display.
description_view_0: Front view shows the driftwood centerpiece, tulip-like buds, cacti, moss balls, and a prominent white flower in a blue-and-white bowl.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the tall tulip-like stems, green moss balls, and a succulent, with less visibility of the driftwood and cacti.
description_view_2: Another front view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the driftwood, cacti, moss balls, and white flower.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the vertical stems and tulip-like buds, with moss balls and cacti partially visible around the base.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with overlapping layers forming a whorled pattern, especially visible on the white sculpted flower and the tulip-like buds. The arrangement shows symmetry and some layering typical of ornamental flowers.
